item_titles: [AINews] Thinky's Inkling: 975B-A41B multimodal, new best American Apache 2.0 open model (with Inkling-Small, 276B-A12B)
Inkling – Open-Weights 975B Parameter LLM
Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
clusters.summary: Thinking Machines发布了其首个开源、拥有9750亿参数的多模态大模型Inkling，主打反对“一刀切”的AI模式。
clusters.title: Thinking Machines发布开源大模型Inkling

item_titles: Bonsai 27B is a full open reasoning model that fits on an iPhone
Apple in talks with PrismML, which shrinks AI models up to 15x to run on iPhones
clusters.summary: PrismML可将AI模型压缩至15倍以适配iPhone，苹果正与其洽谈合作。该技术已成功将270亿参数的模型压缩至4GB以下且保留90%性能。
clusters.title: PrismML模型压缩技术助力iPhone运行大模型

item_titles: OpenAI is now using AI to attack its own AI, and it's working better than humans ever did
GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer
clusters.summary: OpenAI构建了名为GPT-Red的自动化红队LLM，通过自我博弈寻找模型漏洞，其攻击成功率远超人类，以提升AI安全性。
clusters.title: OpenAI推出GPT-Red自动化红队测试系统

item_titles: xAI open-sources "Grok-Build" on GitHub after massive data breach
Mermaid to Unicode box art (grok-mermaid)
xai-org/grok-build, now open source
clusters.summary: 因引发将用户目录（含密码等）静默上传至云端的数据泄露争议，xAI将其命令行工具Grok-Build在GitHub上开源。
clusters.title: xAI开源Grok-Build工具及数据泄露事件

item_titles: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
OpenAI's first hardware product is a screenless AI speaker designed to feel alive
clusters.summary: 在陷入与苹果的硬件法律纠纷之际，OpenAI发布了一款售价230美元的Codex配套键盘，并计划推出无屏AI智能音箱。
clusters.title: OpenAI发布Codex键盘及硬件产品规划

item_titles: The Missed Reality: Code Review Wasn't Built for the AI Era
Why AI code review is not enough
clusters.summary: 多篇文章讨论了为什么仅靠AI进行代码审查是不够的。随着AI生成代码的速度超过人类审查能力，传统的代码审查流程面临巨大挑战。
clusters.title: AI代码审查的局限性

item_titles: Gemma 4 gets a stealth update that fixes tool calling bugs and truncated responses under the same name
clusters.summary: 谷歌为其开源AI模型Gemma 4推送了静默更新，修复了工具调用错误和响应截断问题，并提升了Nvidia GPU上的运行速度。
clusters.title: 谷歌Gemma 4模型发布静默更新

item_titles: Atelier, an open source local AI desktop app for everyone

clusters.title: 开源本地AI桌面应用Atelier

item_titles: Spotify removes 75 million "AI slop" songs

clusters.title: Spotify移除数千万首AI生成歌曲

item_titles: At DocuWriter.ai, the documentation will make you smile:)

item_titles: Don't make one LLM call do retrieval and interpretation
